comments.comment: Acetonitrile is used in our labs for HPLC testing. 10.3 tonnes of Acetonitrile was purchased, however it was used in a closed HPLC system with little fugitive emissions. All waste Acetonitrile was disposed using a certified hauler (Detox Environmental).

All collected methanol waste from laboratory analysis and production ì
